surface_styles.card: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-black/5 p-4

map.description: Full screen map background. Map style should be light/clean.
map.pins: Circular markers with white borders. Color coded by status. Pulse animation for recent pins.

fab.description: Floating action button for 'Reportar'. Placed at bottom-center. High contrast.
fab.classes: fixed bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 px-8 py-4 bg-[#FF6B6B] text-white rounded-full shadow-lg font-bold text-lg flex items-center gap-2 z-50 hover:bg-[#FF5252]

bottom_sheet.description: Use Shadcn Drawer component for the pin details and report form. Keeps user in map context.

onboarding_bg.description: A brown dog laying on top of a lush green field - Use for empty state or onboarding screens

empty_state.description: A corgi stands on grass - Use for 'No reports nearby' or 'All Clean' success states

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first UI taking up 100vh.
Use react-map-gl or a similar mapping library. Ensure the map takes up the full background with 'absolute inset-0 z-0'.
Render Map Pins dynamically based on data. Color code strictly: Red (#FF5252) for <24h, Orange (#FFA726) for 1-3 days, Green (#66BB6A) for >3 days.
Clicking a map pin should open a bottom sheet (Shadcn Drawer) showing the pin details (photo, time, confirmations).
The 'Reportar' button MUST be a prominent Floating Action Button (FAB) anchored at the bottom-center.
Clicking 'Reportar' opens a reporting Drawer with photo upload capability and GPS auto-capture.
Implement the Confirmation System ('Sigue ahí' / 'Ya limpio') as large touch-friendly buttons in the Pin Details Drawer.
All interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attributes.
Use Phosphor Icons (preferred for friendly look) or Lucide React for map markers, camera icons, and close buttons.
Design is for Spain, so ALL text must be in Spanish (Castilian).
